productName: Honey Stixx - 1pk - Flavored Infused Preroll - Twisted Peach - Hybrid - 0.75g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Twisted Peach supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a soft, juicy peach flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
